code:
%%{FinTech_PaymentGateway}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (FinTech_AuthVault)

[FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> DRAFT : ProposalCreated (FinTech_AuthVault)
note right of DRAFT
  Authoring & validation:
  • proposalId assigned
  • schema/policy checks
end note

DRAFT --> REVIEW : SubmittedForReview
note right of REVIEW
  Guard reviews (FinTech_AuthVault)
  Can request changes or reject
end note

REVIEW --> DRAFT : ChangesRequested
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedAtReview
REVIEW --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : ApprovedForVoting (FinTech_LedgerService)

OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : VoteCast (FinTech_LedgerService)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> TALLYING : VotingClosed

TALLYING --> DECIDED_APPROVED : VoteTallied → Approved (FinTech_AuthVault)
TALLYING --> DECIDED_REJECTED : VoteTallied → Rejected (FinTech_PaymentGateway)

DECIDED_APPROVED --> EXECUTION : DecisionRecorded (FinTech_FraudDetection)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> ARCHIVED : DecisionRecorded (FinTech_LedgerService)

EXECUTION --> EXECUTED : PolicyChanged / GrantApproved / ProjectApproved (FinTech_LedgerService)
EXECUTION --> EXECUTION_FAILED : ExecutionFailed

EXECUTION_FAILED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
EXECUTION_FAILED --> RETRY_EXEC : RetryAuthorized
RETRY_EXEC --> EXECUTION : ReExecute

EXECUTED --> AUDIT : ExecutionCompleted
AUDIT --> ARCHIVED : AuditLogged (FinTech_LedgerService)

%% Appeals (FinTech_AuthVault)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
DECIDED_APPROVED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (FinTech_FraudDetection)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (FinTech_LedgerService)

APPEAL --> DECIDED_APPROVED : AppealResolved → uphold
APPEAL --> DECIDED_REJECTED : AppealResolved → overturn
APPEAL --> ARCHIVED : AppealWithdrawn

%% Cancellations
DRAFT --> CANCELLED : WithdrawnByAuthor
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> CANCELLED : CancelledByAuthority
CANCELLED --> ARCHIVED : Archived

%% Terminal states
REJECTED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
ARCHIVED --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway]

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,REVIEW,OPEN_FOR_VOTE,TALLYING,DECIDED_APPROVED,DECIDED_REJECTED,EXECUTION,EXECUTED,EXECUTION_FAILED,RETRY_EXEC,APPEAL,AUDIT,ARCHIVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_PaymentGateway设计一个提案生命周期状态机。核心是从创建到归档的完整流程，涉及多个子系统的协作。
明白了。我注意到您提到了FinTech_AuthVault作为标题中的主系统，但起始又是FinTech_PaymentGateway触发的。这两个系统的关系是怎样的？
FinTech_PaymentGateway是入口，创建提案后由FinTech_AuthVault接管生命周期管理。所以起点是[FinTech_PaymentGateway] -- DRAFT，标注ProposalCreated事件，执行者是FinTech_AuthVault。
好的，我已添加起始状态和第一个转换。同时给DRAFT加了右侧注释，说明这是Authoring & validation阶段，包含proposalId分配和schema/policy检查。
DRAFT之后是REVIEW状态。用户提交后进入Guard评审，评审人可以要求修改或直接拒绝。我需要明确标注SubmittedForReview这个转换。
已添加DRAFT到REVIEW的转换，以及REVIEW的注释说明Guard reviews由FinTech_AuthVault执行。同时画了REVIEW返回DRAFT的ChangesRequested和到REJECTED的RejectedAtReview两条分支。
评审通过后进入投票阶段。这里有个关键点：ApprovedForVoting的转换执行者是FinTech_LedgerService，不是AuthVault。投票期间可以多次投票，所以要有VoteCast的自循环。
确认一下：REVIEW -- OPEN_FOR_VOTE标注ApprovedForVoting，执行者FinTech_LedgerService。然后OPEN_FOR_VOTE有个自循环标注VoteCast，也是FinTech_LedgerService处理。对吗？
对。投票结束后进入TALLYING计票状态，然后分叉到两个终局状态：DECIDED_APPROVED或DECIDED_REJECTED。这两个状态的执行者不同，要注意。
已添加。TALLYING到DECIDED_APPROVED是VoteTallied → Approved，执行者FinTech_AuthVault；到DECIDED_REJECTED是VoteTallied → Rejected，执行者FinTech_PaymentGateway。这里执行者确实不同。
DECIDED_APPROVED进入EXECUTION执行阶段，由FinTech_FraudDetection触发DecisionRecorded。执行成功到EXECUTED，失败则到EXECUTION_FAILED。
执行成功的转换条件是什么？我看到注释里提到了几种情况。
PolicyChanged、GrantApproved或ProjectApproved任一条件满足即可进入EXECUTED，执行者是FinTech_LedgerService。执行失败则标注ExecutionFailed到EXECUTION_FAILED。
已添加EXECUTION的两个分支。现在处理EXECUTION_FAILED的后续：应该有重试和申诉两条路吧？
是的。EXECUTION_FAILED可以RetryAuthorized到RETRY_EXEC，然后ReExecute回到EXECUTION；或者AppealOpened到APPEAL，由FinTech_TransactionQueue处理。
已添加。现在看EXECUTED之后：应该是AUDIT审计，然后归档？
对，EXECUTED -- AUDIT标注ExecutionCompleted，然后AUDIT -- ARCHIVED是AuditLogged，执行者FinTech_LedgerService。另外DECIDED_REJECTED直接到ARCHIVED，也是DecisionRecorded。
已补充。现在需要处理申诉机制。您提到APPEAL可以从多个状态进入？
申诉是跨阶段的。OPEN_FOR_VOTE、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED都可以AppealOpened进入APPEAL，但执行者不同：投票阶段是FinTech_TransactionQueue，已批准是FinTech_FraudDetection，已拒绝是FinTech_LedgerService。
已添加三条进入APPEAL的转换，标注了不同的执行者。APPEAL的出路有哪些？
APPEAL可以AppealResolved → uphold回到DECIDED_APPROVED，或AppealResolved → overturn到DECIDED_REJECTED，也可以AppealWithdrawn直接到ARCHIVED。
已添加APPEAL的三条出路。现在处理取消机制？
对。DRAFT阶段作者可以WithdrawnByAuthor取消；OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段权威可以CancelledByAuthority取消。CANCELLED最终都Archived到ARCHIVED。
已添加取消相关转换。终态方面，REJECTED和ARCHIVED都应该回到FinTech_PaymentGateway？
是的，这两个是终态，流程回到PaymentGateway。最后需要给所有核心状态加上样式，用橙色填充、粗体白色文字。
已添加classDef core样式并应用到所有核心状态。我检查一下：DRAFT、REVIEW、OPEN_FOR_VOTE、TALLYING、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED、EXECUTION、EXECUTED、EXECUTION_FAILED、RETRY_EXEC、APPEAL、AUDIT、ARCHIVED、REJECTED、CANCELLED都已标注。
状态机标题确认是SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (FinTech_AuthVault)，虽然PaymentGateway是入口，但AuthVault是生命周期管理者。
确认标题已设置。整个状态机包含：1个起始点、15个核心状态、约25个转换，涵盖正常流程、申诉、取消、重试等分支。所有执行者系统都已标注。还有其他调整吗？
我发现一个问题：DECIDED_REJECTED到ARCHIVED的DecisionRecorded执行者我前面说是FinTech_LedgerService，但再确认一下——这个应该和DECIDED_APPROVED到EXECUTION的FinTech_FraudDetection区分开， LedgerService是对的。不过我需要再检查一下REJECTED的终态指向。
已核实：DECIDED_REJECTED -- ARCHIVED确实是FinTech_LedgerService。REJECTED是独立的终态，从REVIEW的RejectedAtReview进入，直接回到FinTech_PaymentGateway，不参与后续归档流程。这个设计是正确的。
对，REJECTED和DECIDED_REJECTED是两个不同的状态：前者是评审阶段拒绝，后者是投票后拒绝。流程完整了，可以定稿。
状态机SM-03.01已完成。包含完整的提案生命周期：从PaymentGateway创建，经AuthVault管理的多阶段评审、LedgerService主导的投票、FraudDetection参与的执行决策，以及TransactionQueue处理的申诉机制。所有终态和取消路径都已覆盖。
